# Pull Request Summary

## What changed?

Describe the change briefly.

Example:

```text
Added a new security workflow / updated Kubernetes manifest / improved documentation.
```

---

## Why is this change needed?

Explain the reason for the change.

Example:

```text
This improves repository security, CI/CD validation, or production-readiness.
```

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security lab
- [ ] Kubernetes manifest
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other

---

## Validation Performed

- [ ] I ran local validation
- [ ] I checked Git status
- [ ] I reviewed the changed files
- [ ] GitHub Actions passed
- [ ] Not applicable

---

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets are committed
- [ ] No private credentials are included
- [ ] No unnecessary privileged permissions are added
- [ ] CI/CD permissions follow least privilege where possible
- [ ] Kubernetes manifests follow security best practices where applicable

---

## Notes for Reviewer

Add anything the reviewer should pay attention to.

Example:

```text
Please check the workflow trigger, permissions block, or manifest securityContext.
```
